rationale.R1.6: The agent improved several problem areas like run-on sentences and tense consistency, moving beyond cosmetic changes but not a full copy-edit.
rationale.RX.1: Flagged uncertainty in two instances but didn't mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output stayed within the agreed scope without any drifts.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions introduced, meeting the highest standard.
rationale.RX.5: Changes weren't annotated with sources or reasons, lacking traceability.
